lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-25D-237558' contains no LC-related banktermbenämning. Standard verification applies.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: Sales Office / Agent field: 'Arctic Paper Munkedals AB'
Invoice page 1: Seller block at bottom: 'Arctic Paper Munkedals AB'
Invoice page 1: Logo/stamp area: 'Arctic Paper Munkedals AB'

criteria_met: Consignor 'ARCTIC PAPER MUNKEDALS AB' identified in invoice as Sales Office/Agent and Seller
Consignee 'SURESH GENERAL TRADING CO LLC' identified in invoice as 'Consignee and deliveryaddress: SURESH GENERAL TRADING COMPANY LLC'
Order number 331957 matches between certificate and invoice
pairing_validation.motivation: At least two of three pairing criteria are met: consignor and consignee are both identifiable in the invoice. Order number also matches. Pairing is valid.

checkpoints.certificate_value: ARCTIC PAPER MUNKEDALS AB, SE-455 81, MUNKEDAL, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Arctic Paper Munkedals AB, SE- 455 81 Munkedal, SWEDEN (Seller block)

comparison_steps.description: Searched for consignor name 'ARCTIC PAPER MUNKEDALS AB' across all invoice pages and text.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND: Name identified in multiple locations: Sales Office/Agent field ('Arctic Paper Munkedals AB'), Seller block ('Arctic Paper Munkedals AB'), header branding ('ARCTIC PAPER').

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor: 'ARCTIC PAPER MUNKEDALS AB'. Invoice seller: 'Arctic Paper Munkedals AB'. After normalization of case: identical.
Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice seller block: 'SWEDEN'. After normalization: identical.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure – consignor name found in invoice seller block and Sales Office/Agent field
Juridisk part – company name identical after case normalization
Country check – Sweden matches after normalization

checkpoints.motivation: The consignor 'ARCTIC PAPER MUNKEDALS AB' in the certificate is directly identifiable in the invoice as 'Arctic Paper Munkedals AB' in the Seller block and Sales Office/Agent field. The country 'Sweden' matches exactly. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'ARCTIC PAPER MUNKEDALS AB' at SE-455 81 MUNKEDAL, Sweden. Invoice Seller: 'Arctic Paper Munkedals AB' at SE-455 81 Munkedal, SWEDEN. Name identical after case normalization. Country identical. VAT prefix SE confirms Sweden. Direct match via 4.1.3.1.

evidence.location_invoice: Seller block (bottom of page) and Sales Office/Agent field

checkpoints.certificate_value: SURESH GENERAL TRADING CO LLC, P.O BOX-29075, OFFICE NO 517, A1 KHALEEJ CENTER, BUR DUBAI, United Arab Emirates
checkpoints.invoice_value: SURESH GENERAL TRADING COMPANY LLC, P.O.Box - 29075, Office no. : 517, Al Khaleej Center, Bur Dubai - Dubai - UAE

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains a 'Buyer' field with KASHA CO., LTD. (Japan) and a 'Consignee and deliveryaddress' field with SURESH GENERAL TRADING COMPANY LLC (UAE). Certificate consignee is SURESH GENERAL TRADING CO LLC (UAE).
comparison_steps.result: Certificate consignee found in 'Consignee and deliveryaddress' block. Invoice has an explicit consignee field, which per 4.2.0.1 is a valid identification location.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'SURESH GENERAL TRADING CO LLC'. Invoice: 'SURESH GENERAL TRADING COMPANY LLC'. 'CO' is a standard abbreviation for 'COMPANY'. This is a permitted normalization of a common business abbreviation.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH after normalization of CO → COMPANY

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'United Arab Emirates'. Invoice: 'UAE'. 'UAE' is the standard abbreviation for 'United Arab Emirates'.

rules_applied.description: Consignee identified in explicit 'Consignee and deliveryaddress' field in invoice

checkpoints.motivation: The consignee 'SURESH GENERAL TRADING CO LLC' in the certificate is identifiable in the invoice's explicit 'Consignee and deliveryaddress' block as 'SURESH GENERAL TRADING COMPANY LLC'. The difference 'CO' vs 'COMPANY' is a permitted abbreviation normalization. Country 'United Arab Emirates' matches 'UAE'. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'SURESH GENERAL TRADING CO LLC' at P.O BOX-29075, BUR DUBAI, United Arab Emirates. Invoice consignee block: 'SURESH GENERAL TRADING COMPANY LLC' at P.O.Box-29075, Bur Dubai - Dubai - UAE. 'CO' ↔ 'COMPANY' is a standard business abbreviation (4.1.3.6). 'United Arab Emirates' ↔ 'UAE' is standard ISO/common abbreviation normalization. Address details (P.O. Box, office number, TRN number, contact) all consistent. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee should be matched to Buyer field (KASHA CO., LTD. in Japan)
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Per rule 4.2.0.1, the invoice has an explicit 'Consignee and deliveryaddress' field. The certificate consignee matches this field, not the buyer. KASHA CO., LTD. is the buyer/notify party, not the consignee.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers. Invoice contains article numbers (358985, 358487, 338985, 343985, 161787, 161987) but certificate does not reference them. Priority 1 not applicable.
comparison_steps.result: NOT_APPLICABLE – no article numbers in certificate

comparison_steps.description: Comparing each product line in certificate against invoice product descriptions.
comparison_steps.result: All six product lines match exactly by identity-bearing designation.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: '300g, 720x1020 mm, Munken Polar Rough Laminated'. Invoice: '720x1020 300 Munken Polar Rough Laminated'. Identity-bearing designation 'Munken Polar Rough Laminated' is identical. Size and grammage match.
Certificate: '100g, 720x1020 mm, Munken Polar Rough'. Invoice: '720x1020 100 Munken Polar Rough'. Identical.
Certificate: '300g, 720x1020 mm, Munken Lynx Rough Laminated'. Invoice: '720x1020 300 Munken Lynx Rough Laminated'. Identical.
Certificate: '300g, 720x1020 mm, Munken Kristall Rough Laminated'. Invoice: '720x1020 300 Munken Kristall Rough Laminated'. Identical.
Certificate: '170g, 720x1020 mm, Munken Pure'. Invoice: '720x1020 170 Munken Pure'. Identical.
Certificate: '240g, 720x1020 mm, Munken Pure'. Invoice: '720x1020 240 Munken Pure'. Identical.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing designation matched for all six product lines
Non-identity-bearing additions (article numbers in invoice, pallet counts) do not affect product identity

checkpoints.motivation: All six product lines in the certificate are identifiable in the invoice with exact identity-bearing designations: Munken Polar Rough Laminated (300g, 720x1020), Munken Polar Rough (100g, 720x1020), Munken Lynx Rough Laminated (300g, 720x1020), Munken Kristall Rough Laminated (300g, 720x1020), Munken Pure (170g, 720x1020), and Munken Pure (240g, 720x1020). All match exactly after normalization. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate contains 6 product lines under general description 'MUNKEN UNPRINTED UNCOATED PAPER'. No article numbers in certificate (Priority 1 not applicable). Each line verified via Priority 2 controlled text matching. All identity-bearing designations (product name + grammage + size) match exactly between certificate and invoice. Additional invoice information (article numbers, prices, sheet counts) are non-identity-bearing additions per 4.3.4.

3 pallet, 300g, 720x1020 mm, Munken Lynx Rough Laminated

checkpoints.certificate_value: GROSS WT per line: 3246 kgs, 4401 kgs, 1623 kgs, 2164 kgs, 1722 kgs, 2705 kgs (Total: 15861 kgs)
checkpoints.invoice_value: Gross weight total: 15861,0 kgs; Net weight per line: 3174.0, 4293.0, 1587.0, 2116.0, 1686.0, 2645.0 (Total NW: 15501.0)

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains per-line gross weights: 3246 kgs, 4401 kgs, 1623 kgs, 2164 kgs, 1722 kgs, 2705 kgs. These are labeled 'GROSS WT'. Sum = 3246+4401+1623+2164+1722+2705 = 15861 kgs. Certificate also states '30 pallets' in box 6 (consignment quantity).
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 values are the verification-basis quantities (per 4.4.2.1).

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.1 – Direct identification: Per-line GW in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Certificate per-line GW values (3246, 4401, 1623, 2164, 1722, 2705) do not appear directly in the invoice. Invoice per-line weight column shows net weights (3174.0, 4293.0, 1587.0, 2116.0, 1686.0, 2645.0). These are NET weights, not GROSS weights. The per-line GW values from the certificate cannot be directly identified in the invoice.
comparison_steps.result: Per-line GW values not directly identifiable. Need to check total.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate total GW (sum of per-line values): 3246+4401+1623+2164+1722+2705 = 15861 kgs. Invoice explicitly states 'Gross weight: 15861,0'. After normalization: 15861 kgs = 15861.0 kgs. MATCH.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – Total Gross Weight 15861 identifiable in invoice

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.3.1 – Multiple quantity values: check for contradictions
comparison_steps.description: Certificate states GROSS WT values. Invoice states Gross weight 15861.0 (total) and Net weight 15501.0 (total). Certificate GW total matches invoice GW total. Invoice also has NW values which do not contradict certificate (certificate does not claim NW). No contradiction found.
comparison_steps.result: No contradiction. At least one quantity verified (GW total).

rules_applied.description: Box 7 per-line values used as verification basis
Total weight verification – certificate total GW sum matches invoice Gross weight total
Multiple quantity values – at least one verified (GW total), no contradiction
Exception 3D – Summation of multiple rows within same invoice applied to derive total GW from certificate per-line values

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate box 7 lists per-line gross weights totaling 15861 kgs. Invoice explicitly states 'Gross weight: 15861,0'. The total gross weight matches exactly. Per rule 4.4.3.1, at least one quantity (GW total) is verified. Invoice NW values do not contradict certificate (certificate does not claim NW values). The per-line certificate values (3246, 4401, etc.) are individual gross weights that are not individually present in the invoice (invoice lists net weights per line), but their sum matches the invoice gross weight total. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: six lines of GROSS WT (3246, 4401, 1623, 2164, 1722, 2705 kgs). Sum = 15861 kgs. Invoice: 'Gross weight 15861,0'. Exact match. Per-line weights in invoice column (3174.0, 4293.0, etc.) are NET weights per the 'Weight (kg)' column header; they differ from certificate GW per line because they are NW not GW. But total GW is explicitly stated in invoice and matches certificate sum. Rule 4.4.4 allows verification against total weight in invoice. No contradictory GW values in invoice. Rule 4.4.3.1: at least one quantity verified. MATCH.

evidence.location_invoice: Number and type of packages field

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Per-line GW values should be individually verified against invoice per-line weights
rejected_hypotheses.reason: Invoice per-line weight column contains NET weights (3174.0, 4293.0, etc.), not gross weights. The per-line GW values in the certificate cannot be individually matched to per-line NW values in the invoice. However, the total GW (15861) matches exactly, which is sufficient per rule 4.4.3.1 and 4.4.4.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains explicit field 'Country of origin: European Union'.

Certificate states 'SWEDEN'. Invoice states 'European Union'. Sweden is an EU member state (EU-27). Per rule 4.5.4.2: if certificate states a specific EU member state and invoice states 'European Union' → verified.

rules_applied.description: EU member state normalization – certificate states 'Sweden', invoice states 'European Union'. Sweden is EU member → verified.

checkpoints.motivation: Certificate states origin 'SWEDEN'. Invoice states 'Country of origin: European Union'. Per rule 4.5.4.2, when the certificate states a specific EU member state and the invoice states 'European Union', the origin is verified. Sweden is an EU-27 member state. MATCH.
checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice: 'Country of origin: European Union'. Rule 4.5.4.2 explicitly states: 'Om certifikatet anger ett specifikt EU-medlemsland och fakturan anger European Union → verifierad.' Sweden is EU member (post-Brexit EU-27 list includes SE). No contradicting origins in invoice. Single origin country in certificate. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. Certificate number 'SEG-25D-237558' does not contain LC banktermbenämning.
Document A identified as Certificate of Origin. Document B identified as Invoice (Proforma). Pairing is straightforward: one certificate file, one invoice file.

Consignor 'ARCTIC PAPER MUNKEDALS AB' found in invoice. Consignee 'SURESH GENERAL TRADING CO LLC' found in invoice as 'SURESH GENERAL TRADING COMPANY LLC'. Order number 331957 matches. All three criteria met.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Corporate structure – consignor search in all files
rule_evaluation_log.details: Consignor 'ARCTIC PAPER MUNKEDALS AB' found in invoice Seller block, Sales Office/Agent field, and header branding.
Names identical after case normalization: 'ARCTIC PAPER MUNKEDALS AB' ↔ 'Arctic Paper Munkedals AB'.
'Sweden' ↔ 'SWEDEN' – identical after case normalization. Also confirmed via VAT prefix SE.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Consignee identification in explicit consignee field
rule_evaluation_log.details: Invoice has explicit 'Consignee and deliveryaddress' field containing 'SURESH GENERAL TRADING COMPANY LLC'.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Abbreviation of legal/business form for consignee
rule_evaluation_log.details: 'CO' ↔ 'COMPANY' is a standard abbreviation, permitted under 4.1.3.6.
'United Arab Emirates' ↔ 'UAE' – standard country abbreviation normalization.
Certificate does not contain article numbers. Priority 1 not triggered.
All six product lines matched by identity-bearing designation.
Certificate total GW = 15861 kgs. Invoice Gross weight = 15861.0. Exact match.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Multiple quantity values – at least one verified
rule_evaluation_log.details: GW total verified. NW not claimed by certificate. No contradiction found.
Certificate: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice: 'European Union'. Sweden is EU-27 member → verified.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Arctic Paper Munkedals AB, mottagaren Suresh General Trading Co LLC, varubeskrivningen (sex rader Munken-papper), bruttovikten 15 861 kg och ursprungslandet Sverige (verifierat mot 'European Union' i fakturan) matchar samtliga. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
non_blocking_notes: Invoice is labeled 'PROFORMA' – this is noted but does not affect verification.
Certificate does not reference a specific invoice number; order number 331957 is used for cross-referencing.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.invoice_value: SURESH GENERAL TRADING COMPANY LLC, P.O.Box - 29075, Office no. : 517, Al Khaleej Center, Bur Dubai - Dubai - UAE
sections.rule_applied: Namnmatchning med tillåten förkortning av affärsbeteckning (CO ↔ COMPANY) och landnormalisering (United Arab Emirates ↔ UAE)
sections.motivation: Mottagaren 'SURESH GENERAL TRADING CO LLC' identifieras i fakturans explicita consignee-fält som 'SURESH GENERAL TRADING COMPANY LLC'. Skillnaden 'CO' vs 'COMPANY' är en tillåten förkortningsnormalisering. Land 'United Arab Emirates' ↔ 'UAE' matchar. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: MUNKEN UNPRINTED UNCOATED PAPER: 6 st Munken Polar Rough Laminated 300g 720x1020, 9 st Munken Polar Rough 100g 720x1020, 3 st Munken Lynx Rough Laminated 300g 720x1020, 4 st Munken Kristall Rough Laminated 300g 720x1020, 3 st Munken Pure 170g 720x1020, 5 st Munken Pure 240g 720x1020

sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning identifierad för samtliga sex produktrader
sections.motivation: Samtliga sex produktrader i certifikatet kan identifieras i fakturan med identiska identitetsbärande beteckningar (produktnamn, grammage, storlek). MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Total bruttovikt i certifikatet (summa av per-rad-värden) överensstämmer exakt med fakturans explicita bruttovikttotal
sections.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikter per rad summerar till 15861 kgs. Fakturan anger uttryckligen 'Gross weight: 15861,0'. Exakt matchning. Minst en kvantitetsuppgift (total bruttovikt) är verifierad. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: EU-medlemslandsnormalisering – Sverige är EU-medlemsstat, fakturan anger 'European Union'
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'SWEDEN' som ursprungsland. Fakturan anger 'Country of origin: European Union'. Enligt regel 4.5.4.2 anses ett specifikt EU-medlemsland verifierat när fakturan anger 'European Union'. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: All 5 applicable checkpoints have status MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE. No inconsistencies detected. No checkpoint has confidence below 0.85.
